AGENTS.md.purpose: verify root routing remains visible to the audit

apps/.purpose: verify app surfaces remain routed through the audit

agent/.purpose: verify manifests remain parseable and authoritative

agent/coverage-sources.toml.command: jankurai coverage audit . --config agent/coverage-sources.toml --json target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.json --md target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.md && just score
agent/coverage-sources.toml.purpose: verify coverage evidence source routing and score import

agent/zyal/.purpose: verify canonical ZYAL runbooks stay under agent/zyal and only use the .zyal extension

contracts/.purpose: advisory contract drift scan until project-specific contract checks exist

db/migrations/.purpose: advisory control-plane health check until migration tests exist

db/constraints/.purpose: advisory constraint-lane health check until DB proof exists

docs/architecture/.purpose: verify architecture docs remain visible to the audit

docs/decisions/.purpose: verify decision records remain visible to the audit

README-jankurai-scaffold.md.purpose: verify scaffold marker does not hide missing control-plane files

ops/.purpose: verify ops surfaces remain visible to the audit

tools/.purpose: verify Rust behavior and audit checks

crates/.purpose: verify Rust behavior and audit checks

crates/jankurai/src/commands/coverage.rs.command: jankurai coverage audit . --config agent/coverage-sources.toml --json target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.json --md target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.md && just score

crates/jankurai/src/audit/coverage.rs.command: jankurai coverage audit . --config agent/coverage-sources.toml --json target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.json --md target/jankurai/coverage/coverage-audit.md && just score
crates/jankurai/src/audit/coverage.rs.purpose: verify coverage parsers and evidence normalization

docs/COVERAGE_*.md.purpose: verify coverage evidence docs remain routed

schemas/coverage-*.schema.json.purpose: verify coverage evidence schemas and fixtures
